title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: A YouTube video exploring whether Google engineers use "vibe coding" (likely referring to AI-assisted or intuition-driven development). The content compares OpenAI Codex and Claude Code capabilities and examines adoption trends at Google across 2024-2026.
